name: Mermaid Spa
notes: Russian banya — multiple saunas, plunge pool, platza, Russian food. Budget a good few hours.

name: Russian & Turkish Baths
notes: Historic East Village bathhouse. Plan B alternative to Mermaid. A few hours.
